articles.title: Eternal, Swiggy shares: Blinkit to beat Instamart in Q1? JM's top bet has 70% upside potential
articles.description: For Eternal Ltd, JM broadly maintained its operating assumptions across businesses. However, it upped its target on the stock to Rs 440 from Rs 400, mainly on account of a roll-forward to June 2027.

articles.title: OYO parent Prism files updated IPO papers for Rs 6,650 crore issue: What investors should know
articles.description: Hospitality firm Prism, parent of OYO, has filed updated papers for a Rs 6,650 crore IPO, comprising only a fresh issue of shares. The company plans to use most proceeds to repay borrowings. Prism reported a significant jump in revenue and profit for the first nine months of FY26, driven by its US business. S&P Global Ratings also revised Prism's outlook to 'Positive'.

articles.title: Sensex down 550 pts from day's high, Nifty below 23,900: Selling in IT shares among key factors behind market decline
articles.description: Sensex, Nifty declined amid sharp selling pressure in IT shares on worries about rate hikes in the U.S.

articles.title: BlackBerry's Big Comeback: What's fueling the stock rally?
articles.description: Strong earnings, upbeat guidance and accelerating growth in BlackBerry's QNX automotive software business have reignited investor confidence, driving the stock to a fresh 52-week high.

articles.title: A Fintech Stock That’s Up 80% This Quarter Still Has Wall Street Bulls Asking For More
articles.description: Piper Sandler initiated coverage of Affirm with an ‘Overweight’ rating and a $103 price target, which indicates an upside potential of nearly 26%.

articles.title: As Madhya Pradesh Expands Investment Initiatives, Government Clarifies CM Mohan Yadav's Land Records
articles.description: The statement also provides details regarding agricultural land owned by members of the Chief Minister's family. According to the government, the majority of land owned by Seema Yadav was acquired between 2008 and 2019.

articles.title: Apple Accuses CCI of 'Copy-Pasting' Rivals' Claims in Antitrust Investigation
articles.description: Apple has said the Competition Commission of India (CCI) relied too heavily on complaints from rivals and did not carry out an independent investigation before concluding that the company broke competition rules. In a June 25 filing, Apple asked for the findings to be cancelled. The case is part of Apple's dispute with India's Competition Commission over alleged unfai...

articles.title: Wall Street rebounds as AI rally lifts tech stocks while easing oil concerns boost investor sentiment
articles.description: The S&P 500 snapped a five-day losing streak as AI stocks surged on South Korea's chip investment plans, oil prices steadied on hopes of Iran talks and Treasury yields eased despite lingering inflation concerns.

articles.title: Bandhan Bank CFO Rajeev Mantri resigns
articles.description: Bandhan Bank has announced that its chief financial officer (CFO) and key managerial personnel (KMP), Rajeev Mantri, has tendered his resignation, citing the pursuit of another opportunity for career growth.

articles.title: Top stocks in news: HDFC Bank, RITES, YES Bank, Concor, Axis Bank, SW Solar, Afcons Infra
articles.description: Stocks like HDFC Bank, RITES, YES Bank, Concor, Axis Bank, SW Solar, Afcons Infra, KEC International, SJVN and more will be in the spotlight on Tuesday, June 30.

articles.title: ‘ ₹1-crore receipts unreconciled’: Audit flags lapses at Chandigarh airport
articles.description: The inspection report, following an audit conducted between January 5 and 9 this year, paints a picture of weak financial control and poor inventory management

articles.title: Warren Buffett skips donation to Gates Foundation amid Epstein review: Report
articles.description: Warren Buffett, the chairman of Berkshire Hathaway, has reportedly postponed his customary mid-year donation to the Gates Foundation. This delay stems from his desire to await the outcomes of a review concerning the foundation's connections to the late Jeffrey Epstein. Buffett is expected to make his decision later this year, potentially around his Thanksgiving letter, according to sources cited by The Wall Street Journal.

articles.title: Property sale revived after 9-year payment delay: Telangana HC lets buyer keep property deal alive with 12% interest penalty
articles.description: A Telangana High Court ruling has revived a property deal after a buyer's nine-year delay in paying the Rs 8 lakh balance. Despite the seller's initial opposition, the court condoned the extensive delay, allowing the buyer to complete the sale by depositing the outstanding amount with 12% annual interest. The court emphasized that the seller's failure to appeal the original decree prevented him from opposing the sale now.

articles.title: ‘India Only Country That Rivals China’: US Under Secretary Hails New Delhi's Engineering Talent
articles.description: Helberg noted that the combination of India's booming population, vast engineering pool, and rapid economic growth makes it a prime market for creating cutting-edge services.

articles.title: Oil prices ease as investors await US-Iran talks; Brent crude falls to $72 per barrel
articles.description: Oil prices dipped as markets weighed potential US-Iran talks in Doha against ongoing regional instability. Despite recent missile exchanges and attacks on ships, crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz have seen an uptick. Investors are cautiously optimistic about diplomatic efforts, though tangible signs of de-escalation remain elusive. Analysts suggest Gulf oil flows are steadily recovering, potentially returning to pre-conflict levels soon.

articles.title: Tech Mahindra Shares in Focus: HDFC Securities Maintains Add - Check New Target Price
articles.description: Despite the positive outlook, the brokerage noted that the stock trades at a premium valuation compared to peers, which may cap upside in the near term.

articles.title: Trump urges US gas retailers to cut prices to $2.50 a gallon, warns of 'big problems'
articles.description: US President Donald Trump urged gasoline retailers to cut fuel prices to around $2.50 a gallon, warning of "big problems" if they fail to act despite falling oil prices.

articles.title: Big relief: From July 1, no limits on petrol-diesel as govt lifts ban on commercial buyers
articles.description: Fuel buying rules for commercial users have been rolled back after recent stability in supply. Transport and industrial operations are expected to run with fewer restrictions on fuel access.

articles.title: SLS Stock Hits Over 5-Year High: Retail Traders Bet Big On Breaking $25 As AML Readout Looms
articles.description: Recently updated change-of-control terms also fueled buyout chatter by outlining executive payouts and full equity acceleration related to a change in control.

articles.title: US Stock Market: Economic resilience collides with expensive valuations on Wall Street
articles.description: The US economy shows surprising strength with robust job growth and consumer spending, yet Wall Street is faltering. Investors are wary of lofty valuations, especially in the AI sector, as tech giants increasingly rely on debt for expansion. While chipmakers surge, the 'Magnificent Seven' face headwinds, creating market volatility despite positive economic fundamentals.

articles.title: Rs 2,000-crore road fund sparks row; Bengaluru NavaNirmana Party questions allocations
articles.description: Rs 2,000-cr road fund sparks row; BNP questions allocations

articles.title: Rajasthan to receive Hathnikund water via 3 underground pipelines
articles.description: Three dedicated pipelines will be laid from Hathnikund barrage in Yamunanagar district of Haryana to supply potable “surplus rainwater” between July and October to Rajasthan under an agreement both the BJP-ruled states inked in the presence of Union home minister Amit Shah in Delhi on Monday.

articles.title: Uber, Waymo end robotaxi partnership in Phoenix
articles.description: June 29 : Uber and Alphabet's Waymo have ended their self-driving partnership in Phoenix, Arizona, as the ride-hailing giant prepares to launch a new autonomous vehicle collaboration in the city.Under the partnership struck in 2023, Uber had integrated Waymo's autonomous vehicles into its ride-hailing and foo

articles.title: Good wind energy generation helps in evacuating power from T.N. to other States through power exchanges
articles.description: Tamil Nadu leverages strong wind energy generation to export surplus electricity, showcasing its renewable energy capabilities in June.

articles.title: India-US trade deal on verge of completion, says Ambassador Sergio Gor
articles.description: US Ambassador Sergio Gor announced the India-US trade pact is nearly finalized, with negotiators working on the last 1-2%. He dismissed friction rumours, confirmed Trump's commitment, and noted a recent envoy visit helped overcome delays.

articles.title: NSE, Jio mega IPOs: Why size doesn’t matter, valuations do
articles.description: NSE and Jio IPOs are coming at an expected valuation of 2. 2x the Nifty value. The valuations are largely fair, but historically many large IPOs in the Indian market have struggled to give returns to their investors.

articles.description: The case was registered on June 17 based on an SBI complaint against Zusak E Private Limited, its directors, unknown public servants and others

articles.title: Man does not need to master nature
articles.description: Climate Crisis and Spirituality: Understanding how restoring human self-awareness and eco-conscious values can heal our damaged relationship with nature.

articles.title: Canara Bank hands over ₹2,397 crore dividend cheque to FM Nirmala Sitharaman
articles.description: Canara Bank delivers ₹2,397 crore dividend to FM Nirmala Sitharaman after reporting a record ₹19,187 crore net profit.

articles.title: India's resilience amid energy crisis a model of governance: Kant
articles.description: Amitabh Kant, former NITI Aayog CEO, said India's handling of the global energy crisis is a model of governance. He stated that early policy action, diplomatic efforts, and digital tools ensured normal life was not impacted, unlike in other nations.

articles.title: Govt doubles NIIF commitment to Rs 60,000 cr to boost infra build-out
articles.description: The Union Cabinet approved an additional Rs 30,000 crore for the NIIF, doubling the government's total commitment to Rs 60,000 crore. This investment aims to accelerate infrastructure build-out in key sectors like transport, energy, and digital.

articles.title: Push for private participation in critical minerals sector took place during LDF rule: Satheesan
articles.description: UDF claims private participation in Kerala's critical minerals sector began under LDF rule, emphasizing past decisions by KMML.

articles.title: Skyborn acquires full ownership of 111MW Nordergründe wind farm
articles.description: Before the transaction, Skyborn held a 30% stake in Nordergründe, with the remaining 70% owned by different investors.

articles.title: Yes Bank to raise up to ₹16,000 crore through equity, debt issue
articles.description: Yes Bank said the fundraising would not result in more than 10% dilution of existing shareholders' stake

articles.title: July power bills cheaper by 4.43% in Uttar Pradesh as FPPAS turns record negative
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh electricity consumers will see a welcome 4.43% reduction in their July power bills, the largest monthly benefit in 14 months. This comes thanks to a negative Fuel and Power Purchase Adjustment Surcharge (FPPAS), reflecting lower actual power purchase costs. The Uttar Pradesh Electricity Regulatory Commission's directive ensures this relief benefits all consumer categories across the state.

articles.title: Yamuna Water Project: Haryana, Rajasthan ink pact for surplus water
articles.description: Haryana and Rajasthan signed a historic agreement to end a 30-year deadlock over Yamuna water. The pact facilitates the transport of surplus water from Haryana's Hathnikund Barrage to Rajasthan via pipeline for drinking water needs.

articles.title: Industrial production grows 5.1% in May; BoB cautious on full year
articles.description: A Bank of Baroda report projects a cautious full-year outlook for India's industrial production, citing delays in supply chain normalization. Despite a 5.1% growth in May 2026, the report warns that full recovery will take several months.

articles.title: Delhi's power demand hits all-time high of 8,748 MW amid heatwave
articles.description: Delhi's power demand set a new record of 8,748 MW amid a severe heatwave. Distribution utilities, including Tata Power-DDL, have successfully managed the surge through advance planning, technology, and ensuring an uninterrupted supply.

articles.title: Yes Bank to raise up to $1.7 billion via equity, debt issue
articles.description: Yes Bank is poised to raise up to ₹160 billion through a strategic mix of equity and debt offerings. The board has approved an equity issuance of as much as ₹75 billion alongside a debt issuance reaching ₹85 billion. This approach is designed to strengthen the bank’s capital framework while minimizing dilution for current shareholders and adhering to regulatory standards.

articles.title: Modi government plans major action on petrol and diesel as West Asia crisis nears end, sale restrictions will now be...
articles.description: Modi government plans major action on petrol and diesel as West Asia crisis nears end, sale restrictions will now be...

articles.title: Delhi's peak power demand hits new all-time high of 8,748 MW
articles.description: Delhi recorded its highest-ever peak power demand of 8,748 MW, surpassing the previous all-time high of 8,656 MW. BSES discoms met the demand, and SLDC projections indicate the peak demand may cross 9,000 MW this summer.
